name: WSL / Windows Subsystem for Linux
categoryDescription: Modern Windows artifacts — UWP/AppX packages, OneDrive, and Windows Subsystem for Linux.
description: WSL distribution registration — installed Linux distributions, their install paths, and default distribution.
forensic_value: WSL provides a full Linux environment with access to the Windows filesystem that may evade Windows-focused security controls. Malware increasingly uses WSL to execute Linux ELF binaries. Each subkey is a GUID representing an installed distro with its install location.
